chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4327 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on Misc. No.19144/2024 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No.19145/2024 (Stay) 4. For order on Misc. No.19146/2024 (Inspection) 5. For hearing of main case 04.11.2025 Chaudhry Muhammad Abu Bakar Khalil advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
